test_sufficiency_summary: The updated public-shell.spec.ts validates the new service-unavailable message in the register page source and confirms the old prerequisites message is no longer asserted (AC1). The 409 and 400 source-contract checks are retained (AC4, AC5). Login source is read but service-unavailable and credential message text are not asserted in loginClientSource (AC3, AC6, AC7 gaps). All 157 web tests pass. The two NOTE-level gaps mean future regressions to login copy and the register network-failure condition string could go undetected.
documentation_accuracy_summary: No documentation files were changed. The plan explicitly states this is a user-facing copy-only change with no documentation update required. Auth error messages are not documented in docs/README.md or docs/website-launch-guide.md.
